# `pdf/worker/pdf.worker.ts`

## 📋 Purpose

Web Worker entry point for the PDF pipeline. Receives import requests from the main thread and runs the full extraction pipeline off-thread.

> **Source file:** `src/pdf/worker/pdf.worker.ts`
